user.title: Add UNTIS account
user.description:
Credentials of one student account. Add one entry per child.

{error_detail}

error.invalid_auth: Login failed. See the details above in the description.
error.invalid_school: WebUntis did not recognise this school name. Use the exact spelling from untis.com.
error.too_many_requests: WebUntis is rate-limiting (too many login attempts). Please wait 1–2 minutes.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the WebUntis server. Check the server address.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the Home Assistant log.
